name: property managers handling 10-20 multi-unit properties tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 utility bills/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate reporting instead of spreadsheets and manual entry.
problem_solved: Manual tracking of utility expenses leads to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual tracking of utility expenses leads to errors and delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10-20 utility bills/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate reporting instead of spreadsheets and manual entry.
